hero.description: We transform complex educational scenarios into streamlined AI workflows.

problemSolution.challenge1Desc: Star teachers spend 70% of their time on repetitive grading and material preparation. Pedagogical achievements rely on individual experience, making them hard to scale or institutionalize.
problemSolution.challenge2Desc: Multi-campus scheduling, parent communication, and attendance tracking consume massive administrative manpower. Information silos lead to delayed decisions and limited management reach.
problemSolution.challenge3Desc: During peak application seasons, human response times lag behind demand. Consultant training cycles are long, and standardized plans struggle to meet personalized needs.
problemSolution.solution1Desc: Deploy agents for essay grading, oral practice, and lesson prep. Free teachers from repetitive tasks and transform teaching materials into a queryable RAG knowledge base.
problemSolution.solution2Desc: Build workflows for scheduling optimization, automated parent communication, and data dashboards. Break down information barriers across campuses and exponentially extend management reach.
problemSolution.solution3Desc: Create intelligent advisors for school matching, essay polishing, and application tracking. Automatically handle 80% of standard inquiries during peak times so human advisors focus on high-value conversions.
problemSolution.trust: Trusted by International Schools & Education Institutions

services.card1Item3: Personalized lesson plan & resource integration agent
services.card1Item4: Internal knowledge base (historical lesson plans, exams, rubrics)
services.card1Deliverable: Deliverable: Working agents + teacher manual + 10-hr training
services.card2Deliverable: Deliverable: Workflow system + admin backend + data integration plan
services.card3Deliverable: Deliverable: Consultation agent + knowledge-base guide + consultant training

demo.card1Desc: From 'wait three days after writing' to 'instant feedback'—grammar errors visualized in real time, empowering students to practice independently without relying on teachers to be online 24/7.
demo.card2Hint: Smart admissions advisor / Parent-school communication agent / Personalized learning path planning
demo.card3Desc: Describe your teaching pain point and we'll provide a feasibility proposal within 48 hours.

about.title: From Academic Research to Classroom Reality
about.role: Tsinghua PhD × Decade in Education × AI Application Designer
about.para1: Academic depth: My doctoral training at Tsinghua cultivated a rigorous research methodology—deconstructing complex problems, building systematic frameworks, and iterating through hypothesis validation. Applied to international education, this mindset precisely locates critical breakpoints in teaching workflows.
about.para2: Grounded experience: A decade of frontline involvement in IB, AP, A-Level, and other curriculum systems. I understand the actual workload of teachers, the real pain points of students, and the decision logic of administrators—not as an outsider's imagination, but as an insider's lived experience.
about.para3: Tech integration: When deep academic background meets cutting-edge AI, we no longer settle for 'proof of concept.' We pursue solid deliverables that go live within 4 weeks, that teachers actually want to use, and where data becomes institutional assets. That is the unique value of a scholar-designer.

contact.title: Ready to Deploy AI in Your Institution?
contact.subtitle: Whether you're in research or ready to implement, let's discuss feasibility.
